info.name: Iftar Combos1[For one Person]
info.description:
[Serves1]Break your fast with 2 dates, 2 pcs smoky Chicken Tikka, flaky Lachha Paratha with rich Chicken Chaap, and a comforting 300ml Chicken Haleem. Served with refreshing fruit juice and finished with creamy Phirni for a perfect sweet touch.

A complete and satisfying Iftar meal for one.

info.name: Iftar Combos2[For Two Person]
info.description: [Serves 2] Break your fast with 4 premium dates and 4 pcs smoky Chicken Tikka Kebabs. Enjoy flaky Lachha Parathas paired with rich Chicken Chaap and flavorful Mutton Tikia. Served with 500ml hearty Chicken Haleem, two refreshing fruit juices, and 2 creamy Phirni to end on a sweet note.
